steps.t: Goats in trouble may be found in the Floodfells. You should save any goats who are in trouble.
The Warg encampment of Ujâk-fulug is located in the Floodfells. You should seek out Ujâk-fulug.
The Warg encampment of Ujâk-fulug is located in the Floodfells. You should burn any goat corpses at Ujâk-fulug.
